title: Fix completion semantics

tasks.title: Make checkpoint recording truthful with workflow verification
tasks.verification: Review remediation: routed post-signal verification query through querySignal to use the existing Temporal query timeout wrapper, and updated checkpoint tests to mock querySignal. Verification: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/checkpoint.test.ts src/tools/task.test.ts src/temporal/workflows.signal-handlers.test.ts passed (55 tests); pnpm run check passed.

tasks.title: Make completion ownership canonical in task tools
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm test -- src/tools/task.test.ts failed with new canonical completion expectations (exit 1). GREEN: pnpm test -- src/tools/task.test.ts passed (exit 0). Implemented adv_task_update done guard, removed unregistered adv_task_completed public path, preserved poisoned-history recovery and already-done patch path.

tasks.title: Preserve checkpoint metadata in workflow state
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm test -- src/temporal/workflows.signal-handlers.test.ts exposed overwrite of checkpoint verification by weaker duplicate completion. GREEN: pnpm exec vitest run src/temporal/workflows.signal-handlers.test.ts -t "preserves checkpoint metadata" passed. Implemented guard preserving checkpoint metadata on weaker duplicate completion payloads. Note: broad file run also surfaced unrelated concurrent-signaling gate-order flake/failure; targeted new regression passed.

tasks.title: Align apply workflow and evidence documentation
tasks.verification: Harden remediation follow-up: removed unannotated active-surface adv_task_evidence references from decision docs by routing chat-output evidence wording to adv_run_test plus taskCompletedSignal.verification via adv_task_checkpoint and annotating provider-compliance references as retired fallback evidence. Verification: pnpm run check passed; targeted vitest suite passed (64 tests); targeted docs re-scan marked docs-low-decision resolved.

tasks.title: Set minimal telemetry posture
tasks.verification: TDD not applicable: documentation-only telemetry posture task. Verification: node check confirmed no Prometheus/OpenTelemetry package dependencies and docs/temporal-telemetry-posture.md exists (exit 0). Documented minimal in-process telemetry posture and non-goals.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved problem framing and proposal direction inline: save detailed questions for discovery/design; telemetry should start very minimal.

discovery.approval_evidence: User approved agreement inline with reply: approve. Contract minted with 19 items. AC approved and detailed design questions deferred to design per user direction.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed and independently validated with verdict VALIDATED. No unresolved conflict, user-value tradeoff, or contract-compromise risk. Validator cautions integrated into design: ledger terminology, adv-apply step 3d, minimal telemetry.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep plan inline with reply: approve. Task graph contains 5 tasks with contract refs and TDD intent; strict validation passed with NO_DELTAS warning only.

execution.approval_evidence: All 5 tasks complete. Final targeted suite passed: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/checkpoint.test.ts src/tools/task.test.ts src/temporal/workflows.signal-handlers.test.ts (3 files, 50 tests). Full check passed: pnpm run check. Worktree clean after checkpoint 7747e5bb7c6e96c222e1b9e988954ddfa5de6c05. Strict validation passed with NO_DELTAS warning only.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work inline with reply: accept. Review verdict APPROVED after remediation. Executive summary persisted and verified present. Contract review matrix has 19 rows: 15 required passed/respected, 4 out-of-scope not_applicable, 0 failing/unknown. Verification: pnpm run check passed; targeted suite passed with 55 tests. Worktree clean.

items.text: `adv_task_checkpoint` returns `checkpointRecorded:false` when git checkpointing succeeds but workflow completion recording fails.
`/adv-apply` cannot proceed to task done on `checkpointRecorded:false`.
Normal apply completion cannot emit a second task completion signal that overwrites stronger checkpoint metadata.
`adv_task_update`, `adv_task_completed`, and `adv_task_checkpoint` have a clear, tested relationship in code and registry.
`adv_run_test` docs/specs no longer claim it independently persists durable workflow evidence.
Minimal Temporal/tool telemetry is either implemented or explicitly documented as already sufficient; no Prometheus/OTel dependency is introduced.
Do not reintroduce `defineUpdate` on change workflows.
Keep agent workflow simple; do not add ceremony for its own sake.
Use tests to lock completion semantics and failure paths.
Discovery/design questions about exact completion-tool ownership and telemetry shape are deferred to design, per user instruction.
Do not silently swallow workflow recording failures after successful git checkpointing.
Do not keep contradictory tool guidance.
Do not rely on heuristic inference for completion correctness.
Do not introduce heavyweight telemetry infrastructure for a minimal visibility need.
Changes to gate sequencing or non-task lifecycle semantics.
Prometheus/OpenTelemetry integration unless design proves it is already wired or necessary.

rows.evidence: checkpoint.ts fireTaskCompletedFromCheckpoint returns recorded:false on signal/query failure or mismatch; checkpoint.test.ts covers Temporal unavailable, committed signal failure, clean-tree signal failure, and status/verification/checkpointSha/filesTouched mismatches. Verification: targeted suite 55 tests passed.
rows.notes: Review logic issues on missing failure coverage were fixed and re-verified.

rows.evidence: .opencode/command/adv-apply.md requires checkpointRecorded:true and treats false as blocking; task.ts rejects normal adv_task_update status:'done' with TASK_DONE_REQUIRES_CHECKPOINT. task.test.ts covers the guard.
rows.notes: Normal apply no longer calls adv_task_update done after checkpoint.

rows.evidence: change-state.ts preserves stronger checkpoint metadata against weaker duplicate taskCompletedSignal; workflows.signal-handlers.test.ts verifies duplicate signal preserves verification, summary, filesTouched, touched_files, checkpointSha, completedAt.

task.ts documents adv_task_update done as non-canonical; taskTools no longer exposes adv_task_completed; task.test.ts asserts adv_task_completed is undefined and adv_task_update done rejects normal completion.
rows.notes: Canonical public completion path is adv_task_checkpoint.

rows.evidence: ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md, adv-apply.md, docs/specs/advance-delivery.md, docs/specs/tdd-contract.md, .adv spec JSON, and task output comments align: adv_run_test is executable run evidence; durable final proof is taskCompletedSignal.verification via checkpoint.
rows.notes: No independent durable workflow evidence claim remains in changed guidance/spec files.

rows.evidence: docs/temporal-telemetry-posture.md documents existing health/diagnostic/counter surfaces and explicit non-goals: no Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, persistent metrics DB, or cross-session aggregation. package checks show no new telemetry dependency.
rows.notes: Minimal posture chosen; no heavyweight telemetry added.

rows.evidence: Mutations remain taskCompletedSignal/taskUpdatedSignal through existing signal path; no update-based change-workflow mutation was added.
rows.notes: fireSignalAndRefresh retained for completion signal and cache refresh.

rows.evidence: No defineUpdate was introduced on change workflows; workflow-bundle guard remains covered by targeted workflow tests and pnpm run check.
Completion flow simplified to one normal path: adv_task_checkpoint. Telemetry is documented, not expanded with infrastructure.
rows.notes: No additional ceremony beyond checkpoint verification and docs alignment.

rows.evidence: Regression tests cover checkpoint false returns, canonical done guard, tool removal, metadata preservation, and query wrapper. Targeted suite passed: 55 tests.
rows.notes: Review-added coverage closed the identified gaps.

rows.evidence: Design resolved completion ownership and telemetry shape: checkpoint owns normal completion; telemetry posture is minimal documentation/health alignment.
rows.notes: No unresolved discovery/design question remains for this change.

rows.evidence: checkpointRecorded:false plus recordingError/remediation is returned when workflow recording fails after successful git checkpoint; tests cover committed and clean-tree paths.
adv-apply, ADV_INSTRUCTIONS, specs, and task comments consistently point to checkpoint completion and final verification on taskCompletedSignal; adv_task_completed is not exposed.
Correctness is structural: tool guard rejects non-canonical done, checkpoint verifies workflow state by query, state reducer preserves stronger metadata, tests lock edge cases.
rows.notes: Heuristics only appear as deterministic defensive guard, not primary authority.

rows.evidence: No Prometheus/OpenTelemetry dependency or metrics endpoint was added; telemetry posture explicitly defers platform expansion until a concrete diagnostic gap exists.
rows.notes: Minimal visibility need satisfied by docs/current surfaces.

rows.evidence: Full observability platform integration was not implemented.
No broad Temporal workflow rewrite was performed; change is focused on checkpoint/tool/state semantics.
Gate sequencing and non-task lifecycle semantics were not changed.
Prometheus/OpenTelemetry integration was not introduced; telemetry doc says current surfaces are sufficient.

acceptanceCriteria: `adv_task_checkpoint` returns `checkpointRecorded:false` when git checkpointing succeeds but workflow completion recording fails.
`/adv-apply` cannot proceed to task done on `checkpointRecorded:false`.
Normal apply completion cannot emit a second task completion signal that overwrites stronger checkpoint metadata.
`adv_task_update`, `adv_task_completed`, and `adv_task_checkpoint` have a clear, tested relationship in code and registry.
`adv_run_test` docs/specs no longer claim it independently persists durable workflow evidence.
Minimal Temporal/tool telemetry is either implemented or explicitly documented as already sufficient; no Prometheus/OTel dependency is introduced.
